tum batao, tumhe kaisa laga honestly?.note: 'tumhe kaisa laga' = how did you find it

arre yaar, dekhte hain... confirm nahi h.note: 'dekhte hain' = we'll see (usually a soft no)

chal theek hai, agar mood hua toh aa jaa.note: 'mood hua' = if you feel like it

uss building ke saamne hai, miss nahi ho.note: part of 'ke saamne' = in front of
'miss nahi hoga' = you won't miss it

bahut tasty hai, aapke haath mein toh ja.note: 'haath mein jaadu' = magic in your hands

ab chalta hoon, der ho rahi hai.note: 'der ho rahi hai' = it's getting late

iska kya rate hai aapke yahaan?.note: part of 'aapke yahaan' = at your shop

size medium mein hai? large thoda bada l.note: 'medium mein hai?' = do you have in medium?

main aapko paanch sau dungi, isse zyaada.note: 'isse zyaada nahi' = not more than this

theek hai, le leti hoon, pack kar dijiye.note: feminine; 'le leti hoon' = I'll take it

sar mein bahut dard ho raha hai.note: 'sar mein dard' = pain in the head

pet kharab hai, kuch khaaya nahi jaa rah.note: part of 'khaaya nahi jaa raha' = can't eat
'nahi jaa raha' = isn't able to be (eaten)

achchha mummy, ab rakhti hoon, kal phir.note: lit. 'putting down', idiom for ending a call

usne mujhe paisa de diya.note: auxiliary dena = completed, to someone else

bus mein / auto se / paidal.note: used for open vehicles or means

Hindi mushkil hai par interesting hai.note: invariable adjective; doesn't change for gender

yeh chai pee lo.note: from lena; marks completion + gentle insistence

main yeh kaam kar dungi.note: kar + dena; committed, done for someone

yeh kitaab mujhe de dijiye.note: de + dijiye polite; softens the request

bachhe so gaye.note: so jaana = fall asleep; gaye is past perfective plural

light band kar do please.note: kar + dena; for the speaker's benefit, softer request

main aapka number save kar leti hoon.note: kar + le; small/quick action for self

thoda paani pila do na.note: pila + dena; do it for the speaker

yeh sab samjha do bachon ko.note: samjha + dena; for the listeners' benefit

usne khaa liya.note: khaa + lena (past); finished, benefits the doer

main thak gayi hoon.note: thak + jaana; state fully reached, feminine

bachha rone laga.note: rone laga = started crying; onset, masculine

mera homework kar do.note: kar + dena; listener does it for the speaker

apna homework kar lo.note: kar + lena; listener is own beneficiary

yeh kaam kar daalo.note: kar + daalna; emphatic, finish with force

usne dawa khaai.note: feminine ending, agrees with dawa; 'dawa khaana' = take medicine

main chair par baithi.note: intransitive, no ne; agrees with main (fem. speaker)

papa ne khaana banaya.note: marks subject of a transitive past verb

maine usse phone kiya.note: 'phone kiya' = called; masc., agrees with phone

main roya / main royi.note: rona is intransitive, no ne; masculine speaker

humne saara kaam kar liya.note: kar + lena (perfective); still takes ne, agrees with kaam

main jaata hoon.note: habitual present, masculine; no ne in present tense

main soya.note: sona is intransitive, so no ne even in past

maine khaana khaaya.note: main + ne, ergative subject in past transitive

usne chai pi.note: wo shifts to oblique us + ne

✗ main-ne khaata hoon / ✓ main khaata ho.note: wrong: ne not used in present tense

Cutting din ke pehle grahak ka intezaar.note: din ke pehle = the day's first

Do chai dena, bhaiya. Ek meri aur ek aap.note: for me (f form, agrees with chai)

Arrey wah! Mere liye bhi? Bahut shukriya.note: part of mere liye = for me

Auntie, mere papa wahaan kaam karte hain.note: respectful address to an older woman
le chalti = will take you along

Pehle Lakshmi maa ko diya dikhao, beta..note: Lakshmi maa ko = to Goddess Lakshmi

Shubh Diwali, Nani ji! Yeh aapke liye ch.note: part of aapke liye = for you

Doctor sahab, do din se bukhar hai aur g.note: do din se = for two days

Theek hai, doctor sahab. Kya koi dawa bh.note: leni hogi = will have to take
